case_title: NORTHWEST CREDITORS SERVICE, INC. vs. KENNEY, LISA et al

AS TO DEFENDANT KENNEY, LISA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          AUG-19-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-20-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-01-1994

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF AUG-19-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON AUG-19-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR SEP-20-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-20-1994, CONTINUED TO NOV-30-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
